calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-05-2019 Continued To Mar-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Joseph Gruber for Kelsey Stiles (Administrator).

The Court stated before it today is a Petition for Final Distribution, to Approve the Settlement Agreement, and for Fees. The Court addressed the fees stating that there is a California Rule of Court that states that if the fees are to based on something other than the Inventory and Appraisal that the Schedule of Gains as well as the Schedule of Receipts is to be filed. Mr. Gruber stated that they were not requesting fees re: the Receipts. The Court stated that it still needs to see the Schedule of Receipts and that it wants the required filing made. The Court then addressed the Personal Representative's request for additional fees in the amount of $4,289.50. Mr. Gruber stated that there will be some additional time required before things are finalized such as the filing of the final taxes and that they don't know the exact amount of the fees that will be incurred for that additional time. Mr. Gruber then stated that they are happy to submit. The Court stated that it was prepared to take the matter under submission as of March 19, 2019, that the Schedule of Receipts is to be on file by March 14, 2019, and that if the Schedule of Receipts is not on file that it would restore the matter to calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy K. Chan. Matter Not Reported.
